---
name: Open Question / Architecture Decision
about: Propose or surface a new open question for the decision ledger. These are resolved via PR.
title: '[Q] '
labels: question, architecture
assignees: ''
---

## Question
One crisp question (what exactly needs deciding).

## Context
Where this came up (spec section, code, loom-desk run, real task, etc.).

## Current leaning / options
- Option A (POV): ...
- Option B: ...

## Impact if unresolved
- Blocks which milestone / component?
- Risk to which pillar?

## Proposed resolution (optional)
Your recommended answer + why.

---

After discussion, the resolution will be recorded in `my-docs/open-questions.md` (with date + 🟢) **via a linked PR** that also updates any affected specs. The PR is the canonical ratification artifact.
